title: Quad-Lo
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}} {{Otheruses|Lo}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Quad-Lo.jpg]] |name=Quad-Lo |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]][[Star Wars (1977) 59|''Star Wars'' (1977) 59]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Green]] |skin=Green |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Hmm, not much meat on this one. I couldn't possibly give you more than ten credits."
"Look buddy, can't you see that this is an ambush? Now beat it! I'm not for sale!"
"Hmph. Belligerent, too. Eight credits.|Quad-Lo appraises Lando Calrissian|}} '''Quad-Lo''' was a short, [[Color/Legends|green]] [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Slaver/Legends|slaver]] who frequented the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] ''[[Bazarre]]'' during the era of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Quad-Lo attempted to purchase the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] leader [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] after he arrived on ''Bazarre'' to carry out a weapons deal, assuming him to be someone's property—however, [[Orion Ferret]], the station's owner, swiftly corrected Quad-Lo and sent him away. ==Behind the scenes== Quad-Lo appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 59|''Star Wars'' 59]], written by [[David Michelinie]] and illustrated by [[Walter Simonson]], and released in [[1982]]. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 59|''Star Wars'' (1977) 59]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 59}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Enslavers]] [[Category:Individuals of unidentified species]] [[Category:Males]]
